# SSSAM Academy

> Best Computer Training Institute in Gurugram (Sector 14) offering job-oriented IT courses, practical training with live projects, and placement assistance.

## Contact Information
- **Location:** Old DLF Colony, Sector 14, Gurugram, Haryana, India (Near IFFCO Chowk)
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 92170 31899
- **Website:** https://sssamacademy.com/

## Key Offerings & Courses
SSSAM Academy provides professional training in the following domains:
- **Data Science:** Comprehensive curriculum covering Python, Machine Learning, AI, and statistics.
- **Data Analytics:** Hands-on training with Power BI, Tableau, Advanced Excel, and SQL.
- **Full Stack Development:** Frontend (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React) and backend technologies (NodeJS, databases).
- **Cyber Security & Ethical Hacking:** Network security, ethical hacking tools, cryptography, and defense strategies.
- **Cloud Computing:** AWS and cloud infrastructure management.

## Center Details
- **Center Hours:** Monday - Saturday, 9:00 AM - 7:00 PM
- **Training Mode:** Classroom / Offline (in Gurgaon) & Live Online sessions.
- **Target Audience:** College students, fresh graduates, and working professionals looking to transition to IT.
